metadata.description: AuraCite plugins for Claude Code — AI Visibility / GEO tools and operating skills. See how ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity mention, rank, and cite your brand.

plugins.name: auracite-agent-hub
plugins.description: Connect Claude Code to AuraCite's AI-visibility (GEO) data — brands, mentions, citations, share-of-voice, visibility score, competitors, Google Search Console (top queries, per-page rows, country/device) — plus safe operating skills.
